User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the SikkaTrack HR system, including employees and administrative personnel, with role-based access control.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

username.description: Unique username for login. For employees, this is their Aadhaar number. For others, it's a unique string.

mobileNumber.description: The mobile number of the user. For employees, this also serves as their initial password for login.

role.description: The role of the user within the system, determining their permissions (e.g., SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, HR, EMPLOYEE).

isSuperAdmin.description: A flag indicating if the user is the critical, non-editable SUPER ADMIN.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this user is primarily associated with. (Relationship: Firm 1:N User)

plantIds.description: References to Plants the user has access to or is assigned to. (Relationship: Plant N:N User)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user record was last updated.

Firm.title: Firm
Firm.description: Represents a company or business entity within Sikka Industries & Logistics, which can have multiple plants.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Firm entity.

name.description: The legal name of the firm.

gstNumber.description: The Goods and Services Tax (GST) registration number of the firm.

panNumber.description: The Permanent Account Number (PAN) of the firm.

pfRegistrationNumber.description: The Provident Fund (PF) registration number of the firm.

esicRegistrationNumber.description: The Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) registration number of the firm.

addresses.description: An array of physical addresses associated with the firm.

logoUrl.description: URL to the firm's logo, used for dynamic display in the UI.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the firm record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the firm record was last updated.

Plant.title: Plant
Plant.description: Represents a physical plant or work location belonging to a firm, used for GPS-based attendance validation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Plant entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this plant belongs to. (Relationship: Firm 1:N Plant)

name.description: The name of the plant or work location.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the plant's main entrance or designated attendance point.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the plant's main entrance or designated attendance point.

address.description: The physical address of the plant.

allowedRadiusMeters.description: The maximum allowed distance in meters from the plant's GPS coordinates for valid attendance marking.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the plant record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the plant record was last updated.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Stores detailed information about an employee, including personal details, job role, and current salary structure.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Employee entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm the employee is employed by. (Relationship: Firm 1:N Employee)

plantId.description: Reference to the primary Plant the employee is assigned to. (Relationship: Plant 1:N Employee)

employeeId.description: An internal, unique employee ID (e.g., S0001).

firstName.description: The first name of the employee.

lastName.description: The last name of the employee.

aadhaarNumber.description: The employee's unique 12-digit Aadhaar number, used as their username for login.

panNumber.description: The employee's unique PAN (Permanent Account Number).

department.description: The department the employee belongs to.

designation.description: The job title or designation of the employee.

mobileNumber.description: The employee's mobile number, used as their initial password for login.

dateOfJoining.description: The date when the employee joined the firm.

currentSalaryDetails.description: JSON string representing the current salary structure components for the employee, e.g., {"basic": 10000, "hra": 4000, "da": 2000, "allowance": 1000}.

isActive.description: A flag indicating if the employee is currently active or has been soft-deleted/deactivated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the employee record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the employee record was last updated.

SalaryHistory.title: SalaryHistory
SalaryHistory.description: Records changes in an employee's salary structure, maintaining a historical log of increments and adjustments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SalaryHistory entity.

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee whose salary was changed. (Relationship: Employee 1:N SalaryHistory)

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm associated with this salary history entry. (Relationship: Firm 1:N SalaryHistory)

effectiveDate.description: The date from which the new salary structure became effective.

oldSalary.description: JSON string representing the salary structure components before the change, e.g., {"basic": 10000, "hra": 4000, "da": 2000, "allowance": 1000}.

newSalary.description: JSON string representing the salary structure components after the change, e.g., {"basic": 12000, "hra": 4800, "da": 2400, "allowance": 1200}.

differenceAmount.description: The absolute monetary difference between the new and old gross salaries.

percentageChange.description: The percentage change in gross salary.

recordedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who recorded this salary change. (Relationship: User 1:N SalaryHistory)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the salary history record was created.

Holiday.title: Holiday
Holiday.description: Defines public or company-specific holidays that affect attendance status calculations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Holiday entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm for which this holiday is applicable. (Relationship: Firm 1:N Holiday)

date.description: The specific date of the holiday.

name.description: The name of the festival or holiday (e.g., Diwali, Republic Day).

type.description: The type of holiday (e.g., FESTIVAL, SUNDAY, OPTIONAL, NATIONAL_HOLIDAY).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the holiday record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the holiday record was last updated.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Logs an employee's daily IN and OUT times, calculates working hours, and tracks attendance status and approval workflow.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Attendance entity.

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee whose attendance is recorded. (Relationship: Employee 1:N Attendance)

plantId.description: Reference to the Plant where the employee marked 'IN'. (Relationship: Plant 1:N Attendance)

attendanceDate.description: The calendar date for which the attendance is recorded.

inTime.description: The timestamp when the employee marked 'IN'.

outTime.description: The timestamp when the employee marked 'OUT'. Null if OUT has not been marked.

calculatedHours.description: The total working hours calculated (outTime - inTime).

status.description: The calculated attendance status (e.g., ABSENT, HALF_DAY, PRESENT, PRESENT_ON_HOLIDAY, HALF_DAY_ON_HOLIDAY).

inLocation.description: JSON string representing GPS coordinates and address captured at the 'IN' time, e.g., {"latitude": 28.123, "longitude": 77.456, "address": "123 Main St"}.

outLocation.description: JSON string representing GPS coordinates and address captured at the 'OUT' time. Null if OUT has not been marked, e.g., {"latitude": 28.123, "longitude": 77.456, "address": "123 Main St"}.

isAutoOut.description: A flag indicating if the 'OUT' time was automatically recorded by a cron job after 16 hours.

approvalStatus.description: The current approval status of the attendance record (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED).

approvalRemark.description: Remarks provided by the approver, especially for rejected records.

approvedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who last approved or rejected this attendance record. (Relationship: User 1:N Attendance)

approvalDate.description: The timestamp when the attendance record's approval status was last updated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the attendance record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the attendance record was last updated.

Payroll.title: Payroll
Payroll.description: Contains the generated monthly payroll details for an employee, including salary components, deductions, and net payable amount.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payroll entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm for which this payroll was generated. (Relationship: Firm 1:N Payroll)

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee for whom this payroll was generated. (Relationship: Employee 1:N Payroll)

payrollNumber.description: A unique, auto-generated payroll number (e.g., S20262700001).

payrollMonth.description: The month (1-12) for which the payroll is generated.

payrollYear.description: The year for which the payroll is generated.

payableDays.description: The total number of days payable for the month, calculated from approved attendance.

grossSalary.description: The total gross salary calculated for the employee for the payroll month.

employeePfContribution.description: The employee's contribution to Provident Fund (PF).

employerPfContribution.description: The employer's contribution to Provident Fund (PF).

employeeEsicContribution.description: The employee's contribution to Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC).

employerEsicContribution.description: The employer's contribution to Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC).

netSalaryBeforeAdvance.description: The net salary after PF and ESIC deductions, before any advance deductions.

advanceDeduction.description: Total amount deducted from salary for advance vouchers.

netSalaryPaid.description: The total amount paid to the employee for this payroll, considering all deductions and payments.

totalCtc.description: The total Cost to Company (CTC) for the employee for this payroll period.

status.description: The payment status of the payroll (e.g., GENERATED, PARTIALLY_PAID, FULLY_PAID).

generatedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who generated this payroll. (Relationship: User 1:N Payroll)

generatedDate.description: Timestamp when the payroll was generated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payroll record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payroll record was last updated.

PayrollPayment.title: PayrollPayment
PayrollPayment.description: Records individual payment transactions made against a specific monthly payroll.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PayrollPayment entity.

payrollId.description: Reference to the Payroll record this payment is for. (Relationship: Payroll 1:N PayrollPayment)

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm associated with this payroll payment. (Relationship: Firm 1:N PayrollPayment)

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee who received this payment. (Relationship: Employee 1:N PayrollPayment)

amountPaid.description: The amount paid in this specific transaction.

paymentDate.description: The date and time when the payment was made.

paymentMode.description: The method of payment (e.g., CASH, BANK_TRANSFER, CHEQUE).

transactionReference.description: A reference number for the payment transaction (e.g., cheque number, bank transaction ID).

recordedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who recorded this payroll payment. (Relationship: User 1:N PayrollPayment)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was last updated.

Voucher.title: Voucher
Voucher.description: Manages advance payment requests (vouchers) made by employees, tracking their purpose, requested amount, and payment status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Voucher entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm associated with this voucher. (Relationship: Firm 1:N Voucher)

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee who requested the advance voucher. (Relationship: Employee 1:N Voucher)

purpose.description: The stated purpose for the advance request.

amountRequested.description: The total amount of advance requested.

amountPaid.description: The total amount of the voucher that has been paid out.

status.description: The current status of the voucher (PENDING, PAID, CANCELED).

requestDate.description: The date and time when the voucher was created/requested.

createdByUserId.description: Reference to the User who created this voucher. (Relationship: User 1:N Voucher)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the voucher record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the voucher record was last updated.

VoucherPayment.title: VoucherPayment
VoucherPayment.description: Records individual payment transactions made against a specific advance voucher.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VoucherPayment entity.

voucherId.description: Reference to the Voucher record this payment is for. (Relationship: Voucher 1:N VoucherPayment)

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm associated with this voucher payment. (Relationship: Firm 1:N VoucherPayment)

employeeId.description: Reference to the Employee who received this payment. (Relationship: Employee 1:N VoucherPayment)

amountPaid.description: The amount paid in this specific transaction for the voucher.

paymentDate.description: The date and time when the voucher payment was made.

paymentMode.description: The method of payment (e.g., CASH, BANK_TRANSFER, CHEQUE).

transactionReference.description: A reference number for the payment transaction (e.g., cheque number, bank transaction ID).

recordedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who recorded this voucher payment. (Relationship: User 1:N VoucherPayment)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profiles and role-based access control data for the HRMS system. Includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'plantIds' to facilitate authorization to firm-specific and plant-specific data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Top-level collection for SikkaTrack HR firms. Contains core company details and serves as the root for firm-specific subcollections.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the firm.

definition.description: Subcollection for physical plants or work locations belonging to a specific firm. Includes denormalized 'firmId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent firm.

params.name: plantId
params.description: The unique ID of the plant.

definition.description: Subcollection for holidays applicable to a specific firm. Includes denormalized 'firmId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent firm.

params.name: holidayId
params.description: The unique ID of the holiday record.

definition.description: Subcollection storing detailed information about employees within a specific firm. Includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'plantId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent firm.

params.name: employeeId
params.description: The unique ID of the employee.

definition.description: Subcollection recording changes in an employee's salary structure for a specific firm. Includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'employeeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent firm.

params.name: employeeId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent employee.

params.name: salaryHistoryId
params.description: The unique ID of the salary history record.

definition.description: Subcollection logging an employee's daily attendance records for a specific firm. Includes denormalized 'firmId', 'employeeId', and 'plantId' for authorization independence and efficient employee-specific queries.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent firm.

params.name: employeeId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent employee.

params.name: attendanceId
params.description: The unique ID of the attendance record.

definition.description: Subcollection containing the generated monthly payroll details for an employee within a specific firm. Includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'employeeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent firm.

params.name: employeeId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent employee.

params.name: payrollId
params.description: The unique ID of the payroll record.

definition.description: Subcollection recording individual payment transactions made against a specific monthly payroll for an employee. Includes denormalized 'firmId', 'employeeId', and 'payrollId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the firm associated with the payment.

params.name: employeeId
params.description: The unique ID of the employee receiving the payment.

params.name: payrollId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent payroll record.

params.name: payrollPaymentId
params.description: The unique ID of the payroll payment transaction.

definition.description: Subcollection managing advance payment requests (vouchers) made by employees within a specific firm. Includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'employeeId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent firm.

params.name: employeeId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent employee.

params.name: voucherId
params.description: The unique ID of the voucher record.

definition.description: Subcollection recording individual payment transactions made against a specific advance voucher for an employee. Includes denormalized 'firmId', 'employeeId', and 'voucherId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique ID of the firm associated with the payment.

params.name: employeeId
params.description: The unique ID of the employee receiving the payment.

params.name: voucherId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent voucher record.

params.name: voucherPaymentId
params.description: The unique ID of the voucher payment transaction.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore data structure for SikkaTrack HR prioritizes **Authorization Independence** and **Structural Segregation** to ensure robust security rules and efficient queries. The core strategy involves a hierarchical path structure combined with strategic denormalization of authorization-critical fields.

**Authorization Independence via Denormalization:**
*   Every document in a subcollection will explicitly include the IDs of its parent entities that are relevant for authorization. For instance, `Plant` documents within `/firms/{firmId}/plants/{plantId}` will contain the `firmId` field. Similarly, `Employee` documents will hold both `firmId` and `plantId`. Even for `Attendance` documents, which are nested deep at `/firms/{firmId}/employees/{employeeId}/attendance/{attendanceId}`, they will contain `firmId`, `employeeId`, and `plantId`. This eliminates the need for `get()` calls in Firestore security rules to traverse parent documents for authorization context, making rules atomic, faster, and much easier to debug.
*   User roles (`SUPER_ADMIN`, `ADMIN`, `HR`, `EMPLOYEE`) are stored directly in the `/users/{userId}` documents. Security rules can fetch the `request.auth.uid`'s user document once at the start of evaluation to determine the user's role and associated `firmId` and `plantIds`. This context is then used in combination with the denormalized fields in the target document to grant or deny access without additional document reads.

**QAPs (Queries Are Not Filters) & Structural Segregation:**
*   **Top-level Collections:** `users` and `firms` are top-level. `users` stores individual user profiles and their roles. `firms` stores core company details.
*   **Firm-Specific Data:** All entities that belong to a `Firm` (`Plant`, `Holiday`, `Employee`) are placed as subcollections under `/firms/{firmId}/`. This naturally segregates data by firm, meaning an administrator or HR personnel can only access data relevant to the firms they are authorized for.
    *   Example: `/firms/{firmId}/plants/{plantId}` ensures that when an admin queries `plants`, they can only list those within their authorized `firmId`. Security rules can enforce that `request.auth.uid`'s associated `firmId` matches the `{firmId}` wildcard or the `firmId` field within the `Plant` document.
*   **Employee-Specific Data:** Entities like `SalaryHistory`, `Attendance`, `Payroll`, and `Voucher` are further nested under `/firms/{firmId}/employees/{employeeId}/`. This allows for highly granular access control. An employee can securely query their own `attendance` or `payrolls` (e.g., at `/firms/{theirFirmId}/employees/{theirEmployeeId}/attendance`), while HR/Admins can query across all employees within their firm.
    *   Example: To list all attendance records for a specific employee, an authorized user would query `/firms/{firmId}/employees/{employeeId}/attendance`. The rules can then verify that `request.auth.uid` has the necessary `firmId` and `role` to access that specific employee's records, preventing unauthorized listing of all attendance in the system.
*   **Nested Transactional Data:** `PayrollPayment` and `VoucherPayment` are nested even deeper under their respective `Payroll` or `Voucher` entities (e.g., `/firms/{firmId}/employees/{employeeId}/payrolls/{payrollId}/payments/{payrollPaymentId}`). This provides clear ownership and simplifies rules for managing payment transactions related to a specific payroll or voucher.

This structure ensures that `list` operations are performant and secure because Firestore's security rules can leverage the path and denormalized fields to enforce access policies without relying on complex, inefficient, or insecure filtering mechanisms on the client or in rules themselves.
